chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P.No. S- 220 of 2022 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. FRESH CASE 1. For orders on CMA 32/2023 2. For orders on CMA 62/2022 3. For Hearing of Main Case 23-01-2023 Mr. Mashooque Ali Ghanghro, Advocate for the Petitioner. ***** 1. Urgent application is allowed. 2&3. Through instant petition, petitioner seeks directions to the respondents No.2 to 9 restraining them from causing harassment to him. It is case of the petitioner that he had purchased piece of land from one Waheed Murad through registered sale deed and on that private respondents are annoyed and compelling him to surrender the said land in their favour and issuing him threats for life. It also appears that earlier petitioner filed Crl. Misc. Application No. 3349 of 2020 which was disposed of by learned Sessions Judge/Justice of Peace, Naushehro Feroze vide order dated 23.10.2020. An appropriate remedy is available to the petitioner of lodging FIR, if the alleged respondents are issuing criminal intimidation to him for causing his death. Accordingly, instant petition is, therefore, dismissed in limine along with listed applications. JUDGE Ahmad
